title: Fiery Crispy Uruguayan Tuna Skewers
description: Indulge in spicy crispy tuna skewers with a smoky wok-hei flavor, inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, and made with FODMAP-friendly ingredients. This dish is perfect for those who love a little heat in their meals.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the tuna steaks into 1-inch cubes and place them in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cornstarch, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
Add the cornstarch mixture to the tuna cubes and toss to coat evenly.
Thread the tuna cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the garlic-infused oil onto the tuna cubes.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 12 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and brush with lemon juice.
Sprinkle the chopped chives over the tuna skewers.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy
